tasks.subject: Task 0: Rename identifiers and constants in source code
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Change all suspicious identical discretionary choices in source files.

**Files:**
- Modify: search_chat/types.py, parser.py, database.py, extractor.py

**Verify:** python3 -c "from search_chat.types import CompactBoundary; print(CompactBoundary._fields)"

```json:metadata
{"files": ["search_chat/types.py", "search_chat/parser.py", "search_chat/database.py", "search_chat/extractor.py"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c \"from search_chat.types import CompactBoundary; print(CompactBoundary._fields)\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No pre_tokens in source", "No extract_text function name", "No >>> <<< snippet markers", "No lowercase [tool:", "SCHEMA_VERSION = 2"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Update tests to match renamed identifiers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update all test files to reference renamed identifiers, verify all 101 tests pass.

**Files:**
- Modify: tests/test_parser.py, tests/test_database.py, tests/test_extractor.py

**Verify:** python3 -m pytest tests/ -v → 101 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_parser.py", "tests/test_database.py", "tests/test_extractor.py"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -m pytest tests/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["101 tests pass", "No extract_text in tests", "No .pre_tokens in tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Verification and diff review against fork
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm no suspicious identical lines remain between our codebase and the Denubis fork.

**Verify:** bash commands/search-chat.sh "test" --limit 1 → returns results

```json:metadata
{"files": ["search_chat/"], "verifyCommand": "bash commands/search-chat.sh \"test\" --limit 1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Live search works", "No overlapping identifiers in grep", "Schema version is 2"]}
```
